loop1.title: Energy Input & Distribution
loop1.note: Showing total supplied kW and per-feeder energy/power — per-feeder rated capacity is unknown, so utilization % is not measured.

loop1.title: Energy Flow Diagram
loop1.note: Showing total active power and energy for all PRIMARY members (UPS, BPDB feeders). Incomers (Solar) and Transformer sources are not reporting live data (has_data=N), so their energy flow values are omitted. Efficiency and Loss KPIs are derived from the available supplied vs. consumed totals.
